ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic step */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* The sequence number of the step in the diagnostic process */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action to be performed in this step */,
  "yes_action" TEXT /* The action to take if the result is positive */,
  "no_action" TEXT /* The action to take if the result is negative */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the step, including any necessary tools or equipment */,
  "step_type" TEXT /* The type of diagnostic step (e.g., inspection, measurement, test) */,
  "required_tools" TEXT /* A list of tools required for the step */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* The estimated time to complete the step */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* The difficulty level of the step (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* A link to a video tutorial for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "troubleshooting_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each troubleshooting session */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being diagnosed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the session started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the session ended */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic performing the troubleshooting */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the session (e.g., in progress, completed, paused) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "total_time_spent" TEXT /* The total time spent on the session */,
  "issue_reported" TEXT /* A brief description of the issue reported by the customer */,
  "final_diagnosis" TEXT /* The final diagnosis of the issue */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who brought the vehicle in for service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_troubleshooting_sessions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_troubleshooting_sessions_mechanic_id FOREIGN KEY ("mechanic_id") REFERENCES mechanics ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* The current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* The date of the last service */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* A brief history of previous services */,
  "warranty_status" TEXT /* The current warranty status of the vehicle (e.g., in warranty, out of warranty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanics" (
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanic */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanic */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the mechanic */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service center where the mechanic works */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the mechanic */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the mechanic */,
  "skills" TEXT /* A list of skills or specializations of the mechanic */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* The date the mechanic was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mechanics_service_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_center_id") REFERENCES service_centers ("service_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_centers" (
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the service center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the service center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the service center */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the service center */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* The opening hours of the service center */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* The name of the service center manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* The email address of the service center manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_steps" (
  "session_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session step */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the troubleshooting session */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic step performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the diagnostic step (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the step was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the step */,
  "time_spent" TEXT /* The time spent on the step */,
  "tools_used" TEXT /* A list of tools used during the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_steps_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_steps_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES troubleshooting_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repairs" (
  "repair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the troubleshooting session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repair performed */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the repair was completed */,
  "repair_date" TEXT /* Date when the repair was performed */,
  "cost" TEXT /* The total cost of the repair */,
  "parts_cost" TEXT /* The cost of parts used in the repair */,
  "labor_cost" TEXT /* The labor cost for the repair */,
  "warranty_coverage" TEXT /* Whether the repair is covered under warranty */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the mechanic who verified the repair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repairs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES troubleshooting_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repair_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "repair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repair the part is used for */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part used */,
  "part_cost" TEXT /* The cost of the part */,
  "part_supplier" TEXT /* The supplier of the part */,
  "part_warranty" TEXT /* The warranty period of the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repair_parts_repair_id FOREIGN KEY ("repair_id") REFERENCES repairs ("repair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the article (e.g., diagnostics, repairs, maintenance) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* A list of tags for the article */,
  "views" INTEGER /* The number of views the article has received */,
  "rating" TEXT /* The average rating of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES mechanics ("mechanic_id")
)
